//: Shipped defaults. Prefer editing a copy at ~/.config/prompt-improver/settings.json or .prompt-improver/settings.json (see settings.example.json). Keys starting with // are comments only.
//backend: auto | claude | grok | gemini | codex | cline | opencode | kimi | kiro — Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND
//model: null = per-backend defaults below. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL. Per-prompt model: wins.
//default_models: Generator model per CLI when model is null. null = leave CLI default.
//fallback_strategy: manual = print assembled materials on failure; error = hard fail
//preferred_backends: Only used after primary host/model generator hits limits — not the default pick
//custom_command: Any CLI: prompt on stdin → improved text on stdout. Bypasses built-in backends. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_CUSTOM_COMMAND. null = use backend selection. docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md
notes:
Headless generation model resolution:
1) model: / --model (aliases: mythos, fable-5, gpt-5.6-sol, grok-4.5, …)
2) PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL / settings.model
3) default_models[backend]
4) CLI default

Claude access/limit cascade: mythos → fable → opus → sonnet.
OpenAI 5.6 cascade: sol → terra → luna → gpt-5.5.
Grok: grok-4.5 → composer-2.5-fast → grok-build.
Unknown future IDs pass through; family patterns still route to the right CLI.

Custom CLIs: set custom_command (see docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md).
